properties.name: smarthome.app.frontendBaseUrl
properties.description: Frontend base URL for reset password links and OAuth2 redirects.

properties.name: smarthome.app.jwtSecret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: smarthome.app.jwtExpirationMs
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: smarthome.app.seeder.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the data seeder on application startup.

properties.name: smarthome.app.seeder.create-test-users
properties.description: Whether to auto-create test users on startup.

properties.name: smarthome.app.energyRatePerKwh
properties.description: Energy rate per kWh in Indian Rupees.
